## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Surge AI's 12-month brand and distribution strategy, focusing on elevating their industry position and leveraging key partnerships.](https://fathom.video/share/t1xf6pBzRwo7U_5PH5hmsDePu43esAm5?tab=summary&timestamp=91.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Surge AI aims to be recognized as the leading AI data provider, correcting misconceptions about their role in major AI advancements](https://fathom.video/share/t1xf6pBzRwo7U_5PH5hmsDePu43esAm5?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Strategy involves increasing public presence through podcasts, events, and strategic partnerships with key AI companies](https://fathom.video/share/t1xf6pBzRwo7U_5PH5hmsDePu43esAm5?tab=summary&timestamp=91.0)
  - [Plans to launch research blog, benchmarks, and potentially open datasets to showcase expertise and drive industry conversations](https://fathom.video/share/t1xf6pBzRwo7U_5PH5hmsDePu43esAm5?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
  - [Considering hiring a high-impact DevRel professional to bridge internal knowledge with external communication](https://fathom.video/share/t1xf6pBzRwo7U_5PH5hmsDePu43esAm5?tab=summary&timestamp=1209.0)

## Topics

### Current Brand Perception Challenges

  - [Despite working with major AI labs (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google), Surge AI lacks brand recognition](https://fathom.video/share/t1xf6pBzRwo7U_5PH5hmsDePu43esAm5?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
  - [Competitors like Scale AI have stronger brand associations with AI progress](https://fathom.video/share/t1xf6pBzRwo7U_5PH5hmsDePu43esAm5?tab=summary&timestamp=358.0)
  - [Missed opportunities to be known as the top company for AI training data](https://fathom.video/share/t1xf6pBzRwo7U_5PH5hmsDePu43esAm5?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)

### 12-Month Brand Goals

  - [Establish Surge as the smartest, most trusted AI data provider used by top labs](https://fathom.video/share/t1xf6pBzRwo7U_5PH5hmsDePu43esAm5?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Create FOMO effect for companies not working with Surge](https://fathom.video/share/t1xf6pBzRwo7U_5PH5hmsDePu43esAm5?tab=summary&timestamp=418.0)
  - [Position Surge to steer industry conversations through research, benchmarks, and datasets](https://fathom.video/share/t1xf6pBzRwo7U_5PH5hmsDePu43esAm5?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)
  - [Gain more access to senior leaders in AI companies](https://fathom.video/share/t1xf6pBzRwo7U_5PH5hmsDePu43esAm5?tab=summary&timestamp=506.0)

### Short-term Strategy

  - [Leverage upcoming media appearances (Forbes, podcasts) to create momentum](https://fathom.video/share/t1xf6pBzRwo7U_5PH5hmsDePu43esAm5?tab=summary&timestamp=127.0)
  - [Coordinate podcast appearances to maximize impact and create FOMO](https://fathom.video/share/t1xf6pBzRwo7U_5PH5hmsDePu43esAm5?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [Launch research blog with regular content](https://fathom.video/share/t1xf6pBzRwo7U_5PH5hmsDePu43esAm5?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
  - [Release benchmark/leaderboard efforts (planned for August)](https://fathom.video/share/t1xf6pBzRwo7U_5PH5hmsDePu43esAm5?tab=summary&timestamp=3440.0)

### Mid-term Strategy

  - [Organize executive dinners and AI community meetups](https://fathom.video/share/t1xf6pBzRwo7U_5PH5hmsDePu43esAm5?tab=summary&timestamp=2302.0)
  - [Consider hosting a curated, off-the-record AI industry event](https://fathom.video/share/t1xf6pBzRwo7U_5PH5hmsDePu43esAm5?tab=summary&timestamp=2320.0)
  - [Explore creating demonstrative open datasets or model comparisons](https://fathom.video/share/t1xf6pBzRwo7U_5PH5hmsDePu43esAm5?tab=summary&timestamp=1546.0)

### Potential Hire Consideration

  - [Discussed value of hiring a DevRel professional (similar to Logan Kilpatrick at Google)](https://fathom.video/share/t1xf6pBzRwo7U_5PH5hmsDePu43esAm5?tab=summary&timestamp=1209.0)
  - [Role would bridge internal expertise with external communication, saving leadership bandwidth](https://fathom.video/share/t1xf6pBzRwo7U_5PH5hmsDePu43esAm5?tab=summary&timestamp=1209.0)

### Execution Constraints

  - [Monetary resources less constrained than bandwidth of key team members](https://fathom.video/share/t1xf6pBzRwo7U_5PH5hmsDePu43esAm5?tab=summary&timestamp=3023.0)
  - [Team open to high-leverage activities (e.g., appearing at pre-organized events)](https://fathom.video/share/t1xf6pBzRwo7U_5PH5hmsDePu43esAm5?tab=summary&timestamp=3313.0)
  - [Need to carefully manage Edwin's public appearances to maintain exclusivity perception](https://fathom.video/share/t1xf6pBzRwo7U_5PH5hmsDePu43esAm5?tab=summary&timestamp=3935.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to draft 6-12 month roadmap, including short-term plan for blog relaunch](https://fathom.video/share/t1xf6pBzRwo7U_5PH5hmsDePu43esAm5?tab=summary&timestamp=3408.0)
  - [Coordinate upcoming podcast appearances (20VC, My First Million, others) to maximize impact](https://fathom.video/share/t1xf6pBzRwo7U_5PH5hmsDePu43esAm5?tab=summary&timestamp=3727.0)
  - [Explore potential for creating open datasets or comparative model demonstrations](https://fathom.video/share/t1xf6pBzRwo7U_5PH5hmsDePu43esAm5?tab=summary&timestamp=1546.0)
  - [Continue progress on promotional video and prepare for its release](https://fathom.video/share/t1xf6pBzRwo7U_5PH5hmsDePu43esAm5?tab=summary&timestamp=3420.0)
  - [Team to consider hiring a DevRel professional to support external communication efforts](https://fathom.video/share/t1xf6pBzRwo7U_5PH5hmsDePu43esAm5?tab=summary&timestamp=3209.0)
